notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso plunked
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso hit by pitch. Taylor Ward to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Johnathan Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Johnathan Rodríguez out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Chase DeLauter. Taylor Ward scores.

notableEvents.label: Weston Wilson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Weston Wilson doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Angel Martínez. Pete Alonso scores. Dylan Beavers scores. Leody Taveras to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Jeremiah Jackson.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann hits a grand slam (2) to right field. Steven Kwan scores. Chase DeLauter scores. José Ramírez scores.

notableEvents.label: George Valera pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: George Valera grounds out, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
